case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC VS. HARRY FRIEDMAN, DBA TRI STAR MANAGEMENT et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-19-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC SERVED JAN-18-2012, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-18-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC SERVED MAY-07-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC SERVED MAY-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
POS OF ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CORRECT NAME ON COMPLT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER AND ORDER DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS HARRY FRIEDMAN, DBA TRI STAR MANAGEMENT TO BE FRIEDMAN, HARRY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-19-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY
DECLARATION OF TINA WEST IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, HARRY $10,257.39 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,627.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-20-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
